sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_json (id INT PRIMARY KEY, data JSON);
INSERT INTO test_json (id, data) VALUES (1, json '{"a": [1, 2]}');
SELECT json.isvalid(data) FROM test_json WHERE id = 1;
UPDATE test_json SET data = json '{"b": [3, 4]}' WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, data, json.isvalid(data) AS is_valid FROM test_json;
